summary_markdown: The Core Information Standard workflow processes enable systematic capture and sharing of person-centered information across health and social care settings. Each process incorporates data collection checkpoints that build the comprehensive record while supporting care delivery.

dataCollected.notes: How person wishes to be addressed

activities.objectives: Establish core person record with essential demographics, contacts, and initial accessibility requirements
activities.title: Initial Person Registration

dataCollected.notes: How person wishes to be addressed

activities.objectives: Conduct holistic assessment capturing clinical, social, and personal needs to inform care planning
activities.personas: Social Worker, Community Nurse, Allied Health Professional
activities.title: Comprehensive Assessment

activities.objectives: Develop person-centered care plan based on assessment findings and individual goals
activities.title: Care Planning Development

activities.objectives: Coordinate care delivery across multiple providers ensuring continuity and appropriate service access
activities.personas: Care Coordinator, General Practitioner, Hospital Clinician
activities.title: Ongoing Care Coordination

activities.objectives: Access critical information and execute appropriate response during emergency situations
activities.title: Emergency Response
